creator: nabijaczleweli@nabijaczleweli.xyz
text: Do note that ossp-uuid uses a different (ISC/0BSD-style) licence than ossp-mm, so I'm not sure if that changes your LICENSE_PERMS vocabulary. ossp-mm is /like/ BSD-4-Clause, but the fourth clause is replaced with basically the exact opposite (BSD-4-Clause says "no advertising the author", rse says "you must advertise me").
